scenarios.name: stocktakes-list
scenarios.//readySignal: Ready when the first full page of virtualized rows is painted. Rows are the only elements carrying a translateY transform.
scenarios.//dataRequestUrlPattern: null because the app uses an in-memory mock API (no network data calls). Set to "/graphql" once the real open-mSupply server is wired in — then timeToNetworkQuietMs becomes meaningful.
